display.purpose: Hero headline only — one per page.

body.purpose: Default prose; Ink-2 on paper; ~680px measure.

label.purpose: Uppercase field labels and small trust overlines.

shadows.name: resting-xs
shadows.purpose: Barely-there seat for a resting card.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Lifted state for interactive cards on hover.

shadows.name: brand-glow
shadows.purpose: Ember-tinted glow — primary buttons and featured pricing only.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Default calm ease-out for state transitions and lifts.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Gentle settle for larger movements (card art scale, hero cards).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one action color; used on the single primary CTA per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; min-height: 44px; padding: 13px 26px; font-family: 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.005em; line-height: 1; color: #1d2330; background: #ee7632; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(238,118,50,0.30); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(238,118,50,0.42); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, #ee7632 40%, white); } .ds-btn-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; opacity: 0.75; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Harbor teal — the trust/support voice; supporting actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 9px; min-height: 44px; padding: 13px 26px; font-family: 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; color: #1d2330; background: #6f9ca9; border: 1.5px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(29,35,48,0.06); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(29,35,48,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, #ee7632 40%, white); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Quiet tertiary action; hairline border on paper.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 13px 26px; font-family: 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; color: #1d2330; background: transparent; border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c4; border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f3f0e9; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, #ee7632 40%, white); }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Per-service card: white on paper, tinted illustration blob, colored 'Learn more' link that widens on hover. Shown here in the Legal pillar.
components.html:
Legal

Contracts, compliance, and advisory handled by specialists who know your business.

Learn more ›
components.css: .ds-svc-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e7e2d8; border-radius: 32px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(29,35,48,0.05); transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-svc-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(29,35,48,0.12); } .ds-svc-art { position: relative; height: 120px; } .ds-svc-blob { position: absolute; inset: 12% 16% 8%; border-radius: 46% 54% 58% 42% / 52% 44% 56% 48%; background: #f3ecfa; } .ds-svc-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; padding: 20px 22px 24px; } .ds-svc-icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #f3ecfa; color: #584361; } .ds-svc-title { margin: 0; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.375rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #1d2330; } .ds-svc-desc { margin: 0; font-family: 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #5d626d; } .ds-svc-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; margin-top: 4px; font-family: 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; color: #584361; transition: gap 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-svc-card:hover .ds-svc-link { gap: 8px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Labeled text input; paper fill, Harbor hover, Ember focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #3a3f4b; } .ds-field-req { color: #ee7632; margin-left: 2px; } .ds-field-input { width: 100%; font-family: 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; color: #1d2330; background: #faf8f4; border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c4; border-radius: 16px; padding: 12px 16px; outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms, box-shadow 180ms, background 180ms; } .ds-field-input::placeholder { color: #5d626d; opacity: 0.75; } .ds-field-input:hover { border-color: #6f9ca9; } .ds-field-input:focus { border-color: #ee7632; background: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3.5px rgba(238,118,50,0.15); }

components.name: Header Nav Link
components.description: Sticky frosted-paper header link with active pill state.
components.html: OneDesk.ServicesPricingAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 20px; background: rgba(250,248,244,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px); border-bottom: 1px solid #e7e2d8; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 24px; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: #1d2330; text-decoration: none; margin-right: 16px; } .ds-nav-dot { color: #ee7632; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #5d626d; text-decoration: none; transition: color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1d2330; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #1d2330; font-weight: 700; background: #ebe7de; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ee7632; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Rainbow Hairline
components.description: The brand signature: a 3px six-pillar gradient rule beneath the header. Used once, never repeated.

narrative.overview: OneDesk is one firm that does the work of six — company secretarial, accounting, legal, tax, HR, and marketing. The design system makes that its central idea. Six service palettes (a navy-through-gold spectrum) form the brand's spine, and a single rainbow hairline across the top of every page binds them into one coordinated surface. Between the six, two neutral brand voices do the connective work: Ember (a warm orange) is the one voice of action, and Harbor (a calm teal) carries supporting trust cues. Everything sits on warm ivory paper, so the color never feels clinical. The mood is coordinated specialists under one roof: premium, confident, and expert without being cold or corporate. Hierarchy is weight-driven — heavy Poppins headings against plain-spoken Open Sans body — and elevation is restrained: surfaces are flat at rest and lift only in response to a hover. The system reads as calm authority; it demystifies high-stakes services rather than gatekeeping them.
keyCharacteristics: Six-pillar service palette, unified by one rainbow hairline (the brand signature).
Ember orange as the single action color; Harbor teal as the trust/support voice.
Warm ivory paper ground — never stark white, never beige-sand default.
Weight-driven Poppins/Open Sans hierarchy; premium and legible.
Flat-at-rest surfaces; warm-tinted, restrained shadows that appear on interaction.

rules.name: The One Action Rule
rules.body: Ember is the only color permitted on a primary call-to-action. If two buttons on a screen are both orange, one of them is wrong. Ember's scarcity is what makes it read as the next step.

rules.name: The Service-Color Rule
rules.body: The six pillar colors are semantic, not decorative. A color from the spectrum appears only when its service is the subject (its card, icon, link, or tint). Never borrow Legal Plum because a section needs purple.

rules.name: The Rainbow Hairline Rule
rules.body: The 3px six-color gradient rule belongs at the top of the page, under the header, once. It is the brand signature — do not repeat it as a section divider or scatter it decoratively.

rules.name: The Readable-Shade Rule
rules.body: Base brand and service colors (Ember, Harbor, and the lighter pillars — sage, rust, coral, gold) are for fills, tints, and large art; they do not meet AA as small text on white. Meaningful text, links, icons, tags, eyebrows, and stat numbers use the darker readable shade of the same hue: --od-orange-700 / --od-teal-700 and --od-<svc>-text. Ember/Harbor button fills stay bright but carry a dark-ink label.

rules.name: The Weight-Over-Size Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is carried by Poppins weight (800 headings vs 400/600 body), not by ever-larger type. The display ceiling is ~4rem; the page states its confidence, it doesn't shout.

rules.name: The Plain-Speech Rule
rules.body: Body copy is Open Sans at readable size with a 1.65 line-height. Clarity is a premium signal here — never set long copy in the display face or in all-caps.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: A surface earns a shadow only when the user is about to interact with it. Static decorative shadows and glass panels are prohibited; the header blur is the single exception.

dos: Do author against the --od-* token namespace in app/src/styles/tokens/od.css — the single source of truth for color, type, spacing, radii, shadow, and motion. There is no legacy token layer; never introduce a parallel one.
Do use Ember as the one action color, on ≤1 primary CTA per view (The One Action Rule).
Do keep the six pillar colors semantic — a service color appears only where that service is the subject (The Service-Color Rule).
Do ground everything on warm ivory paper (#faf8f4); reserve pure white for cards and raised surfaces.
Do drive hierarchy with Poppins weight, capping display at ~4rem.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and let them lift on hover with warm-tinted, low-opacity shadows.
Do hold body text at Ink-2 (#3a3f4b) on paper for a comfortable ≥4.5:1 contrast, and keep prose within ~680px.
Do give every interactive control a ≥44px tap target and a visible Ember focus ring.
donts: Don't ship the generic-corporate template — no stock-photo handshakes, no blue-gradient SaaS theme, no faceless big-firm blandness.
Don't slide into discount-services energy — no loud pricing banners, no clutter, no budget-marketplace look.
Don't adopt techy-SaaS costume — no dark-mode-by-default, no neon gradients, no product-feature jargon in the copy.
Don't revert to the stuffy old-fashioned legal look — no dusty serif faces, no dense text walls, no cold formality.
Don't repeat or scatter the rainbow hairline; it belongs once, under the header (The Rainbow Hairline Rule).
Don't set muted Slate on a colored or tinted background where it drops below 4.5:1 — use Ink-2 or a darker step of the background's own hue.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism (the header blur is the sole exception), or colored side-stripe borders.
